programs.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programs.desc: Comedy-drama series. A new arrival on site takes the guys out for a night of country and western music, and the lads go on strike to protest Ally's treatment of Dennis.

programs.title: The Sweeney
programs.desc: Classic police drama series. A Turkish police officer gets Regan involved in a top-secret government deal.

programs.title: Minder
programs.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur ventures into the wine trade with a vintage supplied by the Brothers of the Blessed Bidolph, a small monastic order off the A2.

programs.title: Unwind with ITV
programs.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programs.title: Motorsport Mundial
programs.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
